modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to install anti-virus software on MacBook Pro

full_description_text:
- El usuario está tratando de instalar un software de anti-virus en su MacBook Pro.  
- Es un equipo que le fue proporcionado por la Universidad.  
- Necesita ayuda para completar este proceso de instalación.
